children.heading: Enterprise for the Americas Board
children.label: a Enterprise for the Americas Board
children.text: The Enterprise for the Americas Board established under shall, in addition to carrying out the responsibilities of the Board under , carry out the duties described in subsection (c) of this section for the purposes of this subchapter.section 1738i(a) of title 7section 1738i(c) of title 7

children.label: A
children.text: Two representatives from the United States Government, including a representative of the International Forestry Division of the United States Forest Service.

children.label: B
children.text: Two representatives from private nongovernmental environmental, scientific, forestry, or academic organizations with experience and expertise in preservation, maintenance, sustainable uses, and restoration of tropical forests.

children.heading: Chairperson
children.label: 2 Chairperson
children.text: Notwithstanding , the Enterprise for the Americas Board shall be headed by a chairperson who shall be appointed by the President and shall be the representative from the Department of State appointed under .section 1738i(b)(2) of title 7section 1738i(b)(1)(A) of title 7
Advise the Secretary of State on the negotiations of Tropical Forest Agreements.

children.label: A
children.text: the government of the beneficiary country;

children.label: B
children.text: nongovernmental organizations of the beneficiary country;

children.label: C
children.text: nongovernmental organizations of the region (if appropriate);

children.label: D
children.text: environmental, scientific, forestry, and academic leaders of the beneficiary country; and

children.label: E
children.text: environmental, scientific, forestry, and academic leaders of the region (as appropriate),
Review the programs, operations, and fiscal audits of each administering body.
